name: Crustless Chili Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp + 2 t low fat margarine, melted
1/4 cup Drained chopped roasted red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with nonstick spray.
2. In a medium bowl, lightly beat eggs. Whisk in flour, margarine, mustard, salt, and red pepper sauce. Stir in cottage cheese, Monterey Jack cheese, chilies, and chopped roasted peppers. Spoon mixture into prepared pie plate; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
3. Bake 20-30 minutes, until filling is set and top is golden. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting into quarters.
